templates.label: Surface Temperature Anomalies - North Atlantic
templates.query: Show surface temperature anomalies in the North Atlantic this year.
templates.description: Highlights unusual near-surface warming and cooling patterns in the North Atlantic for the current year.

templates.label: Temperature Profiles >500m - Indian Ocean
templates.query: Show temperature profiles deeper than 500m in the Indian Ocean.
templates.description: Returns deep-water temperature measurements for profiles below 500 meters in the Indian Ocean.

templates.label: Lifetime Temperature Trends - Long Running Floats
templates.query: Show temperature trends over time for floats active for more than 5 years.
templates.description: Tracks how temperature observations evolve across long-duration float missions.

templates.label: Seasonal Temperature - Arabian Sea
templates.query: Show monthly seasonal temperature changes in the Arabian Sea.
templates.description: Summarizes month-by-month seasonal temperature behavior in the Arabian Sea.

templates.label: Warmest Region - Last 90 Days
templates.query: Which ocean region had the highest average surface temperature in the last 90 days?
templates.description: Compares recent surface temperatures across ocean regions and identifies the warmest one.

templates.label: Surface Salinity - Mediterranean
templates.query: Show surface salinity in the Mediterranean Sea this year.
templates.description: Returns near-surface salinity measurements from the Mediterranean for the current year.

templates.label: Thermocline Salinity - Pacific
templates.query: Show salinity at thermocline depth in the Pacific Ocean.
templates.description: Focuses on salinity conditions around thermocline depths in Pacific profiles.

templates.label: High Salinity Events >38 PSU
templates.query: Which floats recorded salinity above 38 PSU in any region?
templates.description: Finds floats and profiles with very high salinity readings regardless of basin.

templates.label: Salinity vs Depth - BGC Floats (Southern Ocean)
templates.query: Show salinity versus depth profiles for BGC floats in the Southern Ocean.
templates.description: Displays salinity-depth structure from biogeochemical floats in the Southern Ocean.

templates.label: Active BGC Floats - Atlantic
templates.query: Show all BGC floats currently active in the Atlantic Ocean.
templates.description: Lists active biogeochemical floats operating in Atlantic waters.

templates.label: Dissolved Oxygen Below 200m
templates.query: Show dissolved oxygen measurements below 200m depth.
templates.description: Retrieves deeper dissolved oxygen observations from ARGO profiles.

templates.label: Chlorophyll - North Pacific Spring
templates.query: Show chlorophyll concentration in the North Pacific spring bloom region.
templates.description: Examines chlorophyll patterns during seasonal bloom conditions in the North Pacific.

templates.label: Nitrate - Peru Upwelling Zone
templates.query: Show nitrate levels in upwelling zones off the coast of Peru.
templates.description: Targets nitrate-rich waters associated with Peru upwelling dynamics.

templates.label: Arabian Sea vs Bay of Bengal Temperature
templates.query: Compare surface temperature between the Arabian Sea and Bay of Bengal this month.
templates.description: Contrasts recent surface temperature conditions between two nearby basins.

templates.label: North Atlantic vs North Pacific Salinity at 100m
templates.query: Compare salinity at 100m depth between the North Atlantic and North Pacific.
templates.description: Measures mid-upper ocean salinity differences between major northern basins.

templates.label: Highest Average Temperature Region
templates.query: Which ocean region has the highest average temperature this year?
templates.description: Ranks ocean regions by annual mean temperature.

templates.label: Float Density in Southern Basins
templates.query: Compare float density across southern hemisphere ocean basins.
templates.description: Compares distribution and concentration of floats across southern basins.

templates.label: Monthly Temperature - Southern Ocean (2 Years)
templates.query: Show monthly average temperature in the Southern Ocean over the last 2 years.
templates.description: Builds a monthly temperature timeline for recent Southern Ocean conditions.

templates.label: Dissolved Oxygen Change - North Pacific
templates.query: How has dissolved oxygen changed in the North Pacific over the last 5 years?
templates.description: Shows long-term dissolved oxygen trends in North Pacific profiles.

templates.label: Seasonal Salinity Cycle - Arctic
templates.query: Show the seasonal cycle of salinity in the Arctic Ocean over the past decade.
templates.description: Reveals repeating salinity seasonality across a ten-year Arctic window.

templates.label: Chlorophyll During Monsoon - Arabian Sea
templates.query: Show chlorophyll time series in the Arabian Sea during monsoon months over the last 5 years.
templates.description: Tracks chlorophyll variability during monsoon seasons in the Arabian Sea.

templates.label: Trajectories of Long-Running Floats - Indian Ocean
templates.query: Show trajectories of floats that were active for more than 3 years in the Indian Ocean.
templates.description: Maps movement paths for long-duration float missions in the Indian Ocean.

templates.label: Recent Deployments and Current Positions
templates.query: Show floats deployed in the last 30 days and their latest known positions.
templates.description: Lists newly deployed floats and where they are currently located.

templates.label: Westward Moving Floats - Tropical Pacific
templates.query: Show trajectories of floats in the tropical Pacific that moved predominantly westward in the last year.
templates.description: Identifies float paths with strong westward displacement.

templates.label: Top 10 High-Cycle Floats
templates.query: Show the top 10 floats with the highest cycle frequency in the past 12 months.
templates.description: Finds floats producing the most frequent recent profile cycles.

templates.label: Temperature Gradient 0-2000m - Indian Ocean
templates.query: Show the temperature gradient from surface to 2000m in the Indian Ocean.
templates.description: Examines vertical temperature structure from upper to deep waters.

templates.label: Oxygen Minimum Zone Depth - Arabian Sea
templates.query: Estimate oxygen minimum zone depth in the Arabian Sea.
templates.description: Detects depth ranges where dissolved oxygen reaches local minima.

templates.label: Mixed Layer Depth - Recent Profiles
templates.query: Estimate mixed layer depth from recent profiles across all regions.
templates.description: Calculates mixed layer depth indicators from the most recent profile set.

templates.label: Deepest Available Atlantic Profiles
templates.query: Show the deepest profiles available in the Atlantic Ocean.
templates.description: Returns profiles that reached the greatest depths in Atlantic basins.

templates.label: pH Below 1000m - Southern Ocean
templates.query: Show pH measurements below 1000m depth in the Southern Ocean.
templates.description: Focuses on deep-ocean pH conditions in the Southern Ocean.

templates.label: High Severity Anomalies - Last 7 Days
templates.query: Show all high severity records from the anomalies table in the last 7 days.
templates.description: Returns recently detected high-severity anomaly events for review.

templates.label: Unreviewed Temperature Anomalies - This Month
templates.query: Which floats have unreviewed temperature entries in the anomalies table this month?
templates.description: Lists floats linked to unresolved temperature anomaly findings.

templates.label: Arabian Sea Anomalies - Last 30 Days
templates.query: Show anomalies table records detected in the Arabian Sea in the last 30 days.
templates.description: Filters anomaly detections to the Arabian Sea over the recent month.

templates.label: Atlantic vs Pacific Anomaly Frequency
templates.query: Compare anomaly frequency between the Atlantic and Pacific using the anomalies table this year.
templates.description: Compares regional anomaly counts across two major ocean basins.

templates.label: Top Repeating Anomaly Floats - Quarter
templates.query: From the anomalies table, show the top 10 floats with repeated anomalies in the last quarter.
templates.description: Identifies floats repeatedly flagged by anomaly detectors over the last quarter.
